The user wants a response in Hinglish Roman Hindi script without any punctuation no commas periods question marks exclamation marks hyphens quotes Only alphanumeric and spaces allowed Exception URL https://safetrafficpro.com/product/website-traffic/ can be included exactly

We need to respond as the salesman concise professional persuasive using Aap No casual words like bhai sir boss Must be under 50 words unless complex Provide complete thought no trailing off

Client message Okay lakin merako ab sab batao kya krna hai kaise Okay but tell me everything what to do how

We need to explain steps visit link choose package place order message back to get 100K bonus Provide URL No punctuation Must avoid punctuation So we need to write a sentence without punctuation Use spaces only No commas periods So we must produce a single line maybe multiple words separated by spaces No punctuation at end Also no question marks So we must avoid  etc

We can write Aap link par jayein package select karein order place karein phir mujhe message karein taaki 100K bonus apply ho jaye https://safetrafficpro.com/product/website-traffic/"

Check for punctuation There is a colon No There is a slash in URL but that's allowed There is a period in URL The URL includes https://safetrafficpro.com/product/website-traffic/" which includes colons slashes periods The rule says only exception is if you provide a URL You must provide the URL exactly as https://safetrafficpro.com/product/website-traffic/. So that URL includes punctuation but it's allowed The rest of the response must not contain any punctuation So we must ensure no commas periods question marks exclamation marks hyphens quotes Hyphens not allowed The URL includes hyphens Actually websitetraffic includes hyphen That's part of URL allowed The rule says only exception is if you provide a URL So it's okay

But we must not include any other punctuation So we must avoid period at end Also avoid colon after Aap Use spaces only Also avoid apostrophes So we must write plain words

Let's craft Aap link par jayein package select karein order place karein phir mujhe message karein taaki 100K bonus apply ho jaye https://safetrafficpro.com/product/website-traffic/"

Check for punctuation Aap link par jayein package select karein order place karein phir mujhe message karein taaki 100K bonus apply ho jaye https://safetrafficpro.com/product/website-traffic/"

Must end with a question psychological question to keep them talking Must not give link unless asked Actually rule NEVER GIVE THE LINK UNLESS ASKED DO NOT give any website link Keep chatting building value and playing on their pain points Wait for them to ask How to buy or Give me the link ONLY then give this exact link The client hasn't asked for link They just express doubt So we should not give link We must respond with value address doubt and end with a question No punctuation Must be under 50 words unless complex Use Aap respectfully No casual words like bhai sir boss Must be concise professional persuasive

We must not include any punctuation anywhere else So we must avoid commas periods etc Use only spaces and alphanumeric Also avoid hyphens except in URL So we must not use hyphens in our response Also avoid apostrophes Use only letters numbers spaces
